text.title: Retrieval Drift Alerting — Decision Tree
text.summary: Branches on metric class, magnitude, and sustained window — routes to P1 page, P3 ticket, or auto-safer-mode gate.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a frozen baseline ≤90 days old loaded?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — refresh baseline before evaluating drift; stale baseline gives false alerts

branch.question: How many of the four metrics breach simultaneously?

conclusion.verdict: P1 PAGE on-call + engage safer-mode gate (r4-safer-mode-gate)

branch.question: What is breach magnitude (σ from baseline mean)?

conclusion.verdict: P1 PAGE — single-metric 3σ breach is severe enough to act
P3 TICKET — recontract candidate; review at next sync
suppress — transient noise; log to drift-history but no alert

example.code: baseline_age_days=14 → metrics_breached=2 (jaccard, neighbour-recency) → r3-routing-by-severity verdict applied → on-call paged + gate engaged
